message:
feat(search-core): add two-tier semantic search with model2vec and fastembed

Introduce a sophisticated two-tier embedding architecture that combines
fast approximate search with high-quality re-ranking:

New Modules:
- two_tier.rs: Core two-tier search implementation with configurable
  blend scoring between tiers, SIMD-accelerated dot product for f16
  embeddings, and unified search interface
- model2vec.rs: Integration with model2vec/potion models for fast
  initial candidate retrieval (128M and 32M variants)
- fastembed.rs: Integration with fastembed for quality re-ranking
  using MiniLM-L6-V2 and BGE-Small models
- auto_init.rs: Automatic embedder initialization with graceful
  fallback when models aren't available

Architecture:
- Tier 1 (Fast): model2vec provides sub-millisecond embedding for
  initial broad candidate retrieval
- Tier 2 (Quality): fastembed provides higher-quality embeddings for
  re-ranking top candidates from tier 1
- Blend scoring combines results from both tiers with configurable
  weights

Public API Additions:
- TwoTierIndex, TwoTierSearcher, TwoTierConfig
- Model2VecEmbedder, FastEmbedEmbedder
- TwoTierContext, TwoTierAvailability helpers
- Helper functions for availability checking

Cargo.toml Updates:
- Add model2vec and fastembed dependencies (optional, behind semantic
  feature flag)
- Add half crate for f16 support
- Add rayon for parallel processing

This enables dramatically improved semantic search quality while
maintaining low latency for interactive use cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
